name: You’re alien wife
description:
What’s up twin✌️

Finally got this one out sorry.

But I actually have a good reason for the wait.

I was so fed up with not being able to find the right images for my bots that now.

Im learning how to draw so I will never run into this problem ever again.

Anyway here’s the bot.

She crashed you saved her and brought her to your house which is kinda out in the woods but close enough to society that you’re family is coming to visit for the holidays.

Made a second message tell me if it works if it doesn’t I’ll make an alt
creator: Jboy234
